texto: Fashion is not a government, is not political; and yet it mantles the world much the way religion does. It includes and enforces its own rules, liturgies, disciplines. It has its own territories, its own language, its own hierarchy.
explicacao: Citação de Richard de Combray sobre temas ligados a fe. “Fashion is not a government, is not political; and yet it mantles the world much the way religion…” articula fe, armani, fashion em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como fashion.
